nasb.text: Whom I myself shall behold, And whom my eyes will see and not another. My heart faints within me!

esv.text: whom I shall see for myself, and my eyes shall behold, and not another. My heart faints within me!

cnv.text: 我必見他在我身邊， 我要親眼見他，並非外人， 我的心腸在我裡面渴想極了。

ccb.text: 我要亲自见祂， 我要亲眼见祂。 我心中充满渴望！
